data.name: %s, Your bravery is proven in Devil Square.

data.name: Must be over level 10 to combine the invitation to Devil Square.
data.value: Must be over level 10 to combine the invitation to Devil Square.

data.name: RumorHasItThatRecentlyMonsters
data.value: Rumor has it that recently monsters have been wandering around Noria. I thought those creatures only existed as part of a legend... I wonder what could have brought them here.

data.name: If you want to find out about the Devil Square, go meet Charon in Noria
data.value: If you want to find out about the Devil Square, go meet Charon in Noria

data.name: TheDevilSquareIsAPlace
data.value: The Devil Square is a place where warriors prove their courage. Qualified warriors will be given the Devil invitation. Go to the Chaos Goblin in Noria with the Devil eye, Devil key, Jewel of Chaos and enough Zen.

data.name: YouHaveComeTooSoonYou
data.value: You have come too soon. You may be able to enter the Devil Square if you wait for your time and revisit later.

data.name: SomeSayThatTheDevilEyes
data.value: Some say that the Devil eyes have been found on some monsters on the MU continent. Try to hunt as many monsters as possible to get Devil eyes. If you get one, go meet Charon in Noria.

data.name: ManyAdventurersAndWarriorsAreCrowding
data.value: Many adventurers and warriors are crowding into Devil Square to prove their courage. Warrior, are you on your way to Devil Square?

data.name: DoNotYouWantToProve
data.value: Do not you want to prove that you are the bravest of the bravest. Opportunity lies ahead of you. If you get the Devil Eye and Key, you will be one step closer to that opportunity.

data.name: ThousandsOfYearsAgoTheDevil
data.value: Thousands of years ago, the Devil Eye and Key had once existed in the MU Continent and disappeared. But now they can be seen all over the continent. Go and find them, and bring them to the Chaos Goblin in Noria

data.name: AreYouLookingForTheDevil
data.value: Are you looking for the Devil Eye too? The Devil Eye can be found on most monsters on the MU continent. If God is with you, you will be able to find what you seek.

data.name: BringMeTheDevilEyeDevil
data.value: Bring me the Devil Eye, Devil's Key, and a Jewel of Chaos. The Devil's invitation will be granted to you only after you bring me those three items.

data.name: YouVeBroughtTheDevilS
data.value: You've brought the Devil's treasure! May the Goddess of fortune be with you so you may find treasure that suits your needs.

data.name: FinallyTheGateOfDevilSquare
data.value: Finally, the gate of Devil Square has opened again. Charon the gate keeper will allow you to enter Devil Square

data.name: ManyAdventurersAreLookingForThe
data.value: Many adventurers are looking for the Devil's Eye and Key. You need both of them to receive a ticket that will get you into Devil Square.

data.name: Only level above %d can do the Chaos Combination.
data.value: Only level above %d can do the Chaos Combination.

data.name: These items cannot be stored in the inventory.
data.value: These items cannot be stored in the inventory.

data.name: You've been given a chance to prove your bravery.
data.value: You've been given a chance to prove your bravery.

data.name: No one has ever entered the Devil Square yet.
data.value: No one has ever entered the Devil Square yet.

data.name: No human has ever gone there.
data.value: No human has ever gone there.

data.name: Do not believe anything you see in there.
data.value: Do not believe anything you see in there.

data.name: Only trust your bravery and strength
data.value: Only trust your bravery and strength

data.name: Only your bravery and strength will keep you alive.
data.value: Only your bravery and strength will keep you alive.

data.name: Bring the Devil's invitation to enter.
data.value: Bring the Devil's invitation to enter.

data.name: You've come too late to enter the Devil Square.
data.value: You've come too late to enter the Devil Square.

data.name: You're underestimating yourself. Choose another square.
data.value: You're underestimating yourself. Choose another square.

data.name: If you wish to stay alive, choose another square.
data.value: If you wish to stay alive, choose another square.

data.name: Must be over level 15 to combine a Cloak of Invisibility.
data.value: Must be over level 15 to combine a Cloak of Invisibility.

data.name: Rena registered at the Golden Archer
data.value: Rena registered at the Golden Archer

data.name: TheSeasonOfBlessingHasCome
data.value: The season of blessing has come and the Golden Archer who collects Rena has appeared on the MU continent. If you take 10 Rena to the Golden Archer who stands in front of Lorencia, he will tell you a story about himself.

data.name: RenaIsATypeOfGold
data.value: 'Rena' is a type of gold coin that was used in the world of Heaven which had existed before the MU continent. If you bring Rena to the Golden Archer in front of Lorencia, he will give you a number of Lugard, the God of the world of Heaven.

data.name: AfterTheRessurectionOfKundunSome
data.value: After the ressurection of Kundun, some monsters have taken possession of what is called the Box of Heaven. If you find Rena in the box, bring it to the Golden Archer in front of Lorencia. It is said that he tells a story to those who bring 10 Renas.

data.name: YouVeBrought10RenaAs
data.value: You've brought 10 Rena. As a token of my appreciation, I will tell you a bit about Rena. Rena is made of a type of golden metal that doesn't exist in MU. Scholars have discovered through their studies that Rena comes from the world of Heaven.

data.name: RenaEmbodiesAVeryStrongPower
data.value: Rena embodies a very strong power source of mana and it is said that ancient wizards used to create powerful spells with Rena. While studying the world of Heaven, 'Etramu', the greatest wizard of ancient times, created un unbreakable magic metal called 'Secromicon' with the Rena that he had accidentally discovered.

data.name: AfterThenScholarsOfMUStudying
data.value: After then, scholars of MU studying Etramu discovered that the world of Heaven had actually existed and tried to solve the secret of the world of Heaven through Rena.

data.name: ButThroughConstantWarAllThe
data.value: But through constant war, all the Rena had disappeared and the studies couldn't be continued. I've tried to find Rena to solve the secret of the world of Heaven all my life.

data.name: AfterTheResurrectionOfKundunI
data.value: After the resurrection of Kundun, I've discovered that some monsters on the continent surprisingly possessed the box of heaven. I don't know what Kundun exactly has in mind but one thing I'm sure is that Kundun is trying to use the power of Rena.

data.name: BeforeKundunFindsRenaHiddenIn
data.value: Before Kundun finds Rena hidden in Mu, we have to find them and figure out the secret and the origin of the power.

data.name: June 7-8, 'MU Level UP 2003' event will be held in Coex Mall.
data.value: June 7-8, 'MU Level UP 2003' event will be held in Coex Mall.

data.name: An event solving the secret of heaven will be held from June 7th to 8th
data.value: An event solving the secret of heaven will be held from June 7th to 8th

data.name: Bring Rena from the box of heaven.
data.value: Bring Rena from the box of heaven.

data.name: When you bring 10 Rena, you will be given a number blessed by Lugard.
data.value: When you bring 10 Rena, you will be given a number blessed by Lugard.

data.name: You can exchange the registered Rena to Zen
data.value: You can exchange the registered Rena to Zen

data.name: TheGoldenArcherWillStayAt
data.value: The Golden Archer will stay at Lorencia until July 8th to exchange Rena to Zen

data.name: AreYouThrowingRenaOnThe
data.value: Are you throwing Rena on the ground? Rena may be of little use in this world, but it can be exchanged to Zen by the Golden Archer.

data.name: RyanTheMaidOfTheBar
data.value: Ryan, the maid of the bar in Lorencia, says that Rena can be exchanged into Zen. Go see the Golden Archer if you have any Rena.

data.name: RenaIsATypeOfCoin
data.value: 'Rena' is a type of coin that used to be used in the world of Heaven eons ago. It can't be used in this world, but if you go to the 'Golden Archer' in Lorencia, he'll exhange it to Zen.

data.name: LorenIsTheNameOfA
data.value: Loren is the name of a kingdom of advanced sword masters and home to many renowned Dark Knights.

data.name: Must be over level 10 to use fruits
data.value: Must be over level 10 to use fruits

data.name: Reward received when returned to the Archangel
data.value: Reward received when returned to the Archangel

data.name: Used when creating a Cloak of Invisibility
data.value: Used when creating a Cloak of Invisibility

data.name: Collecting Stones. Please give me stones that you've acquired!
data.value: Collecting Stones. Please give me stones that you've acquired!

data.name: You may enter only %d times per day.
data.value: You may enter only %d times per day.

data.name: ISeeThatYouHaveThe
data.value: I see that you have the Cloak of Invisibility. But you need to wait till the gate opens to enter the Blood Castle.

data.name: YourCourageIsAdmirableButYou
data.value: Your courage is admirable but you need a Cloak of Invisibility to enter Blood Castle. You need more than just courage, warrior.

data.name: YourWillToHelpTheArchangel
data.value: Your will to help the Archangel is appreciated. But be careful, young warrior for Blood Castle is a dangerous place. May God be with you.

data.name: AhGreatWarriorThanksToYour
data.value: Ah! Great warrior. Thanks to your help, we have been able to protect the lands from Kundun's soldiers. As a token of our appreciation, I will share my experience with you.

data.name: YouReAWarriorInTraining
data.value: You're a warrior in training, I see. I will trust in your courage. Go ahead and bring down those evil creatures and bring me back my weapon.

data.name: IfYouThinkYouAreBrave
data.value: If you think you are brave enough a warrior, go to the Blood Castle. They say you can receive the Archangel's blessing.

data.name: YouVeComeToPurchaseA
data.value: You've come to purchase a Cloak of Invisibility? Acquire the 'Scroll of Archangel' and a 'Blood Bone' and visit the Chaos Goblin. You'll be able to get one there.

data.name: HaveYouComeToRepairSomething
data.value: Have you come to repair something? I don't know where Blood Castle is. Why don't you go ask the Messenger of Archangel in Devias.

data.name: BloodCastleIsAnExtremelyDangerous
data.value: Blood Castle is an extremely dangerous place. You might want to go with others as courageous as you if you want to help the Archangel.

data.name: Are you going to the Blood Castle? Please help out the Archangel. Please!
data.value: Are you going to the Blood Castle? Please help out the Archangel. Please!

data.name: YouLlFindTheScrollOf
data.value: You'll find the 'Scroll of Archangel' and 'Blood Bone' by hunting monsters on the Continent of Mu.

data.name: TheArchangelHasBeenProtectingThis
data.value: The Archangel has been protecting this land from the evil hands of Kundun since the very beginning. I'm sure he'd be glad to find aid.

data.name: It seems as though the only one who can help the Archangel is you.
data.value: It seems as though the only one who can help the Archangel is you.

data.name: TheLiquorThatISellHere
data.value: The liquor that I sell here strengthens the warriors. Help yourselves to defeat the evil creatures in Blood Castle.

data.name: IHeardTheCreaturesInBlood
data.value: I heard the creatures in Blood Castle are vicious. And you're going there? Quite a brave soul, you are.

data.name: TheArchangelIsFightingTheEvil
data.value: The Archangel is fighting the evil creatures of Kundun in the Blood Castle alone! If you are indeed as brave as you say you are, go help out the Archangel!

data.value: Even if you die or use the 'transport command' or the 'Town Portal Scroll' during the quest, do not disconnect until the quest is finished. If you disconnect, you will not be able to receive any reward for completing the quest.

data.name: TheWeaponHasBeenFoundThank
data.value: The weapon has been found. Thank you. You'd better get yourself out of here quickly.

data.name: DoYouEvenKnowAboutMe
data.value: 'Do you even know about me? I've been both blessed and cursed from Lugard. You may be helped if you are appropriately qualified.'

data.value: If you have passed through the Apostle Devin's test, Werewolf Guardsman will send you and your party members Balgass' Barrack.

data.name: StrongMentalityAndExcellentInsightCreates
data.value: Strong mentality and excellent insight creates the most powerful curse spell. Also this item pulls out another world summoners and use the detrimental sorcery against them.

data.name: KingdomOfWizardsDescendantOfArka
data.value: Kingdom of wizards, descendant of Arka. He has a inferior physical condition but has a enormous power and can command attacking spells freely.

data.name: KingdomOfKnightsDescendantOfLorencia
data.value: Kingdom of knights, descendant of Lorencia.With a powerful strength and swordsmanship he can handle most of the close-range weapons.

data.name: KingdomOfElvesDescendantsOfNoria
data.value: Kingdom of elves, descendants of Noria. A master of arrows and bows and commands various spells.

data.name: ComplexCharacterThatHasACharacteristics
data.value: Complex character that has a characteristics of the Dark knight and Dark wizard. Master in a close-range combat and can command spells freely.

data.name: CharismaticCharacterThatCanCommandThe
data.value: Charismatic character that can command the troops and handle the Dark spirit and Dark horse.

data.name: ReArlIsAnAncientLanguage
data.value: Re Arl is an ancient language that means a fallen angel and the one who gets this wing will have a cursed destiny that will harm his sibling and pals.

data.name: OriginatedFromTheGodOfLights
data.value: Originated from the God of lights Lugard, Lugard is ruler of the heaven and absolute god of lights.

data.name: MurenIsOneOfTheHeroes
data.value: Muren is one of the heroes who sealed Secrarium and united the continent who became the first emperor of the empire.

data.name: ItWasOriginatedFromTheSaint
data.value: It was originated from the Saint of Muren, Lax Milon which mean the 'person who are loved'.

data.name: ItWasOriginatedFromTheGreatest
data.value: It was originated from the Greatest magic gladiator Gion who was in favor of Muren but Gion betrays Muren later on.

data.name: RuneIsOneOfTheHeroes
data.value: Rune is one of the heroes who sealedSecrarium and she is the leader of the elves and was a queen of Noria.

data.name: SirenIsBeingCalledAsA
data.value: Siren is being called as a 'Guide star' which is the only star that does not change its location and became an index of directions.

data.name: ElkaIsAMemberOfThe
data.value: Elka is a member of the Gods of Lugard and is a merciful Goddess of luck and peace.

data.name: TitanIsAGiantWhoGuards
data.value: Titan is a giant who guards Cathawthorm where the Kundun is sealed and it was created by Eturamu to protect the sealed stone.

data.name: MoaIsALegendaryIslandAway
data.value: Moa is a legendary island away from the continent and is a mysterious place that no one can enter.

data.name: ItWasOriginatedFromUseraThe
data.value: It was originated from Usera, the Hierophant of Garuda clan. Usera helped Runedil to let Kilian succeed to the throne.

data.name: ItWasOriginatedFromTarkanThe
data.value: It was originated from Tarkan, the desert of death. Tar means 'desert sand' in ancient language.

data.name: AtlansIsAnUnderwaterCityCreated
data.value: Atlans is an underwater city created by the people of Kantur and it had more glorious civilization than the homeland Kantur.

data.name: ItSAnAcronymOfAncient
data.value: 'It's an acronym of ancient language 'Taruta De Rasa' which means 'the most intelligent man under the sky' and being used to call the Greatest wizard Arikara.

data.name: NakalEpitaphWasDiscoveredByThe
data.value: Nakal epitaph was discovered by the historians that shows the epics of 3 heroes in action during the 2nd Demogorgon Wars.

data.name: ItWasOriginatedFromTheGreatest1732
data.value: It was originated from the Greatest wizard Eturamu and he gave his life to protect the sealed stone..

data.name: KaraIsTheFirstQueenOf
data.value: Kara is the first queen of Noria which means the 'Greatest elf' in ancient language.

data.name: StarOfDestinyThisStarShares
data.value: 'Star of destiny'. This star shares a fate with the MU continent and it alerts the evil spirits in the continent.

data.name: AncientCivilizationFromTheMUContinent
data.value: Ancient civilization from the MU continent.The existence of this civilization has been a controversy between the historians.

data.name: EnormousMagicStoneAtTheCenter
data.value: Enormous magic stone at the center of the underground city Kantur. People in Kantur calls this magic stone as Maya.
